narrative: Hopes for a US-Iran peace deal drive a dollar sell-off as geopolitical risk premiums unwind — DXY -0.17% at a 2.5-month low; gold higher +1.06% near $4,744; equities +1.46%; VIX 17.5. NZD/CAD is the week's dominant G8 theme (NZD +0.819%, CAD -0.574%, spread 1.393%) as falling oil prices and RBNZ-BoC divergence anchor the move. AUD/USD holds at 0.7260 on a -60bp carry disadvantage vs the Fed, though peace optimism sustains the bid. Watch US Non-Farm Payrolls at 12:30 UTC for the next directional catalyst.
